news.headline: COEPTIS launches COEP Venture Group investing in AI, RPA, AI Agent Startups. Nasdaq: COEP. Dedicated to cutting-edge tech.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Wexford, Pennsylvania, COEPTIS, Inc. (Nasdaq: COEP) introduced the COEP Venture Group. This new investment arm aims to support and boost technology startups focused on Artificial Intelligence (AI), Robotic Process Automation (RPA), and AI Agents. COEPTIS, Inc. is a tech company committed to advancing cutting-edge technologies and artificial intelligence in biotechnology therapeutic solutions. The venture group will provide funding and resources for startups in these sectors, solidifying COEPTIS' position at the forefront of innovation in technology investment.

news.headline: Interest-rate futures gain, reflecting rising bets on a Fed rate cut in July, but a September rate cut is still seen as more likely.

ASEAN-Japan Women Entrepreneurs’ Summit in Kuala Lumpur focuses on driving innovation, sustainability, and inclusivity. Important organizations involved: AJC, ASEAN Youth Organization, ACCMSME, Women Leadership Foundation Malaysia.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, the ASEAN-Japan Centre (AJC) partnered with the ASEAN Youth Organization, supported by the ASEAN Coordinating Committee for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (ACCMSME) and Women Leadership Foundation Malaysia, to host the ASEAN-Japan Women Entrepreneurs’ Summit. This summit highlighted the importance of women entrepreneurs in promoting economic innovation, sustainability, and inclusivity within the ASEAN-Japan region. The event saw the participation of key stakeholders, with a focus on empowering women in business.

news.headline: Viz.ai's Stroke Solution proven to improve patient outcomes and hospital economics according to new studies at ISC 2025.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Viz.ai, a prominent provider of AI-driven disease detection and care coordination solutions, disclosed recent clinical findings endorsing progress in neurovascular treatment. At the International Stroke Conference (ISC) 2025, two research reports highlighted the favorable results of utilizing Viz.ai technology in treating patients with acute large vessel occlusion (LVO) strokes. The studies demonstrated the tangible benefits of Viz.ai in real-world medical settings, showcasing its potential to significantly impact outcomes for individuals with LVO strokes, a major contributor to mortality and disability rates in the United States.

news.headline: Communication services sector and industry on the rise. Stay updated with Bloomberg for latest news.
Himax Q4 revenue grows 4.2% YoY to $237.22M, earnings per ADS $0.14 beats estimate, gross margin 30.5%, stock price rises.
news.summary: Himax Technologies, Inc posted a fiscal fourth-quarter revenue growth of 4.2% YoY, reaching $237.22 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $221.09 million. Net revenues from the Arm Holdings customer rose by 6.7% Q/Q due to increased orders. Earnings per ADS stood at $0.14, higher than the analyst estimate of $0.10. The stock price saw an increase following the report. The gross margin hit 30.5%, surpassing guidance and previous quarters. Revenue from large display drivers reached $25.0 million. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Round Rock Healthy Hearts at Stony Point High School wins HOSA Community Awareness title out of 35 teams, reaching 300,000+ for Heart Health Initiative.
news.summary: In Round Rock, Texas, on February 13, 2025, a group known as Round Rock Healthy Hearts, comprising students from Stony Point High School, achieved top honors among 35 competing teams in the Health Occupations Students of America (HOSA) Area 1 Community Awareness contest held at Byron P. Steele High School.

news.headline: Boston Globe's Rare Disease Summit on Feb 25 brings together industry leaders and advocates for powerful conversations. Register now!
news.summary: Register now for the Rare Disease Summit taking place on Tuesday, February 25 in Boston. This event will bring together health industry leaders and advocates for discussions with the rare disease community. The summit promises to offer valuable insights and engage in meaningful conversations. Mark your calendars for this important event.

news.headline: Pair Eyewear introduces three new base frame colors for a more personalized eyewear experience, reflecting soft, emotional hues inspired by the upcoming spring and summer seasons.
news.summary: Pair Eyewear is staying true to its goal of adding delight and individuality to eyewear by introducing a fresh color palette consisting of soft, emotive shades reminiscent of the approaching spring and summer seasons. The company, based in New York, made this announcement on February 13, 2025. Established as the pioneers of direct-to-consumer eyewear, Pair Eyewear continues to innovate in this space.

news.headline: Metalpha's revenues increase nearly four-fold in half-year FY2025. Company announces $5 million share repurchase program.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, a company known as Metalpha Technology Holding Limited, publicly traded as MATH on Nasdaq, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the six months concluding on September 30, 2024. Metalpha specializes in digital asset wealth management and is recognized as a key player in the global market. The financial report revealed the revenue generated during this period, indicating promising figures for the company's future prospects.

news.headline: Carrier CEO David Gitlin will present at Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on Feb 20, 2025 at 1:50pm ET.
news.summary: Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on February 13, 2025 - Carrier Global Corporation's Chairman & CEO, David Gitlin, is scheduled to present at Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 20, 2025, at 1:50 p.m. Eastern Time. This event will be streamed live, and viewers can tune in to hear more about Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) and its latest insights in the industry.

news.headline: Points4Purpose launches new cashback retailer rewards to facilitate micro-donations to charities, revolutionizing loyalty rewards.
news.summary: Miami, February 13, 2025 - Points4Purpose, Inc. has made a significant announcement regarding its plan to transform the loyalty rewards sector and revolutionize philanthropic contributions in the United States. The company has revealed its latest initiative, a cashback rewards system along with an automated micro-philanthropy platform. This innovative move aims to enhance the process of providing support to charitable causes by seamlessly integrating it with consumers' everyday transactions. The platform promises to streamline the donation process and increase contributions to various charitable organizations across the country.

news.headline: In November 2024, increase in acute respiratory diseases and infections. Hypertension rises nationally to fourth position. Telehealth utilization decreases nationally but increases in West and Midwest.
news.summary: In the latest data released on telehealth diagnostics, hypertension has moved up from fifth to fourth in the list of top five categories nationally. Interestingly, while telehealth utilization saw a decline across the nation, as well as in the South and Northeast regions, it increased in the West and Midwest. This shift suggests a pattern of changing health concerns and preferences among Americans. This update comes in the midst of various healthcare trends, with hypertension standing out as a significant health issue.

news.headline: ATS offers 3x ROI guarantee for Reliability 360® Machine Health Monitoring in 2025, setting new industry standard.
news.summary: In Peoria, Illinois, as of February 13, 2025, Advanced Technology Services, Inc. (ATS), a reputable provider of industrial maintenance and reliability solutions, has unveiled a groundbreaking offer. They have rolled out a new guarantee which promises customers a significant three times return on investment (ROI) for their Reliability 360® Machine Health Monitoring service. This offer is now accessible to all interested parties.

news.headline: Cambridge Kitchens Mfg. is redefining luxury kitchen design in NY, blending innovation and craftsmanship.
news.summary: In Hicksville, New York, on February 13, 2025, Cambridge Kitchens Mfg. is revolutionizing kitchen design in the upscale residential sector throughout New York and the Tri-State area. Through a blend of innovative technology and traditional artistry, the company has emerged as a prominent player in the market.

news.headline: Weekly jobless claims drop by higher-than-expected rate in the United States.
US short-term interest-rate futures little changed after economic data, the Fed is still seen waiting until September to cut policy rate.
Meta allows competitors access to Facebook Marketplace amid EU antitrust battle.
SunCar Technology increases partnership with global EV leader, now covering 48 cities; a major move in the industry.
news.summary: SunCar Technology Group Inc., an innovative leader in auto e-insurance and cloud-based B2B auto services in China, has recently revealed a major expansion in its strategic partnership with a significant company. This announcement, made on Feb. 13, 2025, signifies a key development for SunCar, listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SDA. The partnership aims to strengthen SunCar's position in the market and drive further growth in the industry. This move underscores SunCar's commitment to enhancing its services and offerings in the auto sector, showcasing its dedication to innovation and expansion in the Chinese market.

news.headline: RulaPen+ by Orangered Life improves rulers with better readability, measuring angles. Fixes metric/imperial switch hassle.
news.summary: In London on February 13, 2025, it was reported that rulers have remained unchanged for decades, with complaints including small, difficult-to-read markings, inconvenient measuring angles, and the ongoing issue of having to switch between metric and imperial units. Additionally, the difficulty of locating a pen when necessary exacerbates these frustrations.

news.headline: Liquidation sale for M&R Polaris PR 2 Stryker printers in Charlotte, offering expanding textile-embellishers an opportunity to acquire sophisticated digital equipment known for its speed, capacity, and versatility. Tiger Group accepting offers on three high-speed printers.
news.summary: A liquidation sale in Charlotte, North Carolina on February 13, 2025, is offering the chance for textile-embellishers to acquire advanced digital equipment recognized for its speed, capacity, and versatility. Tiger Group is currently accepting offers on three cutting-edge high-speed direct-to-garment machines. This presents a valuable opportunity for businesses looking to expand, with the equipment known for its efficiency and flexibility. Interested parties can submit bids to potentially acquire these sophisticated machines.

news.headline: Investors Title Company reports Q4 2024 results with $8.4M net income, $70.6M revenues (up 31.6% YoY).EPS $4.41 vs $3.09.
news.summary: Investors Title Company (Nasdaq: ITIC) based in Chapel Hill, N.C. shared their financial results for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2024. In this period, the company posted a net income of $8.4 million, translating to $4.41 per diluted share. This is a notable increase from the previous year's figures of $5.8 million in net income, or $3.09 per diluted share. The company experienced a significant surge in revenues, marking a 31.6% increase to reach $70.6 million, compared to $53.7 million in the previous year. This boost in revenue was mainly attributed to the rise in net premiums written and escrow, in addition to title-related fees.

news.headline: Arkstone launches NeoSure™, expanding maternal care on OneChoice platform in Boca Raton, Fla. since Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 13, 2025, Arkstone, a prominent provider of laboratory infectious disease advice and antimicrobial management, has unveiled NeoSure™ as part of its OneChoice program. NeoSure™ marks a major enhancement to OneChoice's current pregnancy treatment recommendations.

news.headline: Genesis Bank to acquire Excel Bank in all-cash transaction. No extra capital needed. Genesis Bank to operate post-acquisition.
news.summary: In Orange County, California, Genesis Bank and Excel Bank (operating as EH National Bank) have agreed to a definitive acquisition deal. Genesis Bank will acquire Excel Bank in an all-cash transaction. Following the acquisition, Excel Bank will operate under the name Genesis Bank. The transaction will be completed without the need for additional capital due to Genesis Bank's robust capital ratios.

news.headline: Choice Properties REIT declared $0.063333 cash distribution per trust unit for Feb 2025, totaling $0.76 per unit annually.
news.summary: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust ("Choice Properties") (TSX: CHP.UN) has disclosed a monthly cash distribution for February 2025 at $0.063333 per trust unit. This amount equals $0.76 per trust unit annually. The distribution is set to be paid on March 17, 2025, to Unitholders recorded as of the end of business on February 28, 2025. Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust is a prominent player in the sector.

news.headline: Tempus (NASDAQ: TEM) partners with IFLI to develop targeted therapies for Follicular Lymphoma patients.
news.summary: In Chicago, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) revealed a recent partnership with the Institute for Follicular Lymphoma Innovation (IFLI), a global non-profit foundation focused on fast-tracking innovative treatments for individuals with follicular lymphoma (FL). The collaboration seeks to create and provide a real-world multimodal, deidentified...

news.headline: Housing supply reaches highest level since 2020, demand at lowest; pending home sales drop 4.2% in January.
news.summary: In Seattle, homebuyers are currently experiencing the highest level of housing options since 2020, as reported by Redfin. Despite this, many are hesitant to make a purchase due to the increasing costs of housing, making monthly payments difficult to manage. According to Redfin's findings, pending home sales in January have reached a record low, second only to the beginning of the pandemic, with a notable 4.2% month-over-month decrease. This marks the most significant decline in pending home sales on a seasonally adjusted basis since August 2023. The report indicates that this decrease in home sales is significant, standing at 6%, emphasizing the current challenges that homebuyers are facing in the Seattle real estate market.

news.headline: Trio-Tech reports Q2 2025 financial results, shipments for SiC and GaN power modules; CEO S.W. Yong comments.
news.summary: In Van Nuys, California, Trio-Tech International, a company listed on the NYSE MKT under ticker symbol TRT, revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The company, known for its semiconductor back-end solutions and global electronic equipment services, reported noteworthy achievements. Among them were the successful delivery of dynamic tester systems designed for Silicon Carbide (SiC) and Gallium Nitride (GaN) power modules. S.W. Yong, Chairman and CEO of Trio-Tech International, shared insights on these developments.

news.headline: Planforge releases Planforge 25 with Gate Management Option (GMO) to track product maturity levels; introduces GenAI.
news.summary: A company based in Raaba-Grambach, Austria, has unveiled the latest edition of its project work management software, known as Planforge 25. This updated version includes the addition of the Gate Management Option (GMO), a module designed to monitor the product maturity level for development projects. Additionally, Planforge 25 debuts its initial set of assistant features powered by GenAI, following the announcement made towards the end of last year. The release also showcases enhanced customizable portfolio dashboards.

news.headline: Cintas Corp recognized as one of the Most Admired Companies by FORTUNE for the 17th time.
news.summary: The prestigious award for strong reputation and innovation has been conferred on the business services leader for the 17th time in Cincinnati.

news.headline: DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. gets $4M credit line from Menachem Light, enhancing its mission to provide entry-level employees and small businesses with vehicles. Light to chair board of advisors.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, PA on February 13, 2025, a recent announcement stated that a $4 million credit line guaranty has been secured to support the DriveItAway mission. This initiative aims to address the personal transportation challenges faced by entry-level employees in the U.S. The funding will specifically cater to providing vehicles for small commercial enterprises while enhancing accessibility for individuals and small businesses. The DriveItAway all Digital Flexible Lease Subscription Mobility Platform will enable interested parties to drive and subsequently purchase quality vehicles, furthering the goal of expanding mobility options in the market.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands' CWENCH Hydration now in all 24 Fortinos supermarkets in Greater Toronto & Hamilton. Loblaw has 2,400+ locations.
news.summary: Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTC: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF), a leading company in the hydration industry, has shared the exciting news that Fortinos, a prominent supermarket chain, has started stocking CWENCH Hydration™ in all 24 of its stores across Greater Toronto and Greater Hamilton areas in Ontario. Fortinos is under the Loblaw Group of Companies, a major Canadian retail player with over 2,400 locations, ensuring that 90% of Canadians live within close proximity, typically within 10 kilometers, of one of their stores. This partnership expands the reach of CWENCH Hydration™ to a wider audience and offers great potential for growth.

news.headline: Key dates for 2025 financial calendar of Realkredit Danmark A/S including earnings release and annual general meeting.
Navega Therapeutics adds 4 new strategic advisors to the board, enhancing expertise.
news.summary: Epigenetic gene therapy company, Navega Therapeutics based in San Diego, shared exciting news on Feb. 13, 2025, revealing the inclusion of four seasoned advisors to their board. This significant move aims to leverage the expertise of these entrepreneurial professionals to enhance the company's strategic direction and operations. Established as a prominent player in the field, Navega Therapeutics continues to strengthen its position by bringing in a wealth of experience to fuel its growth.

news.headline: SealingTech partners in Poland to enhance global security with edge computing and cybersecurity solutions.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Columbia, Maryland, Sealing Technologies, a subsidiary of Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN), a renowned provider of cutting-edge edge computing hardware and cybersecurity services for government organizations and private businesses, released a statement expressing their pride in delivering advanced solutions to safeguard sensitive data.

news.headline: BNY's CFO will speak at RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference, Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation, a leading global financial services company listed on the NYSE as BK, revealed that Dermot McDonogh, their Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to address audiences at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference.

news.headline: AngelQ and Arcee AI release KidRails for LLMs, an open framework for training language models for age-appropriate online experiences for children.
news.summary: A new initiative has been launched to create age-appropriate online experiences for children. AngelQ and Arcee AI have collaborated to introduce KidRails for LLMs, an open framework designed to enhance language models. This venture aims to ensure safer and more tailored digital interactions for young users. The announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on February 13, 2025. The framework is the first of its kind and signifies a significant step towards improving online safety for children.

news.headline: TCBP completes Cohort A in ACHIEVE trial, reports no adverse events with TCB008 infusion. Promising signs of stable disease.
news.summary: TC BioPharm (Holdings) PLC, a biotechnology company based in Edinburgh, Scotland, announced on February 13, 2025, that there have been no reported adverse events associated with their product TCB008. Evidence has shown that patients who received TCB008 infusion have experienced stable disease. TC BioPharm is listed on NASDAQ as TCBP and is in the clinical stage of development.

news.headline: Cincinnati Children's ranked No. 30 in Forbes' list of America's Best Large Employers, top 4% out of 701 companies.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on February 13, 2025, Cincinnati Children's was once more honored as one of America's top Large Employers by Forbes. Among 701 companies acknowledged, Cincinnati Children's achieved a national ranking of No. 30, placing them in the top 4% across various industries. The dedicated medical providers and staff at Cincinnati Children's continue to make a significant impact in their field.

news.headline: PhaseV launches webinar series on AI and clinical trials. Focus on trial design and execution. Exciting innovations shared.
news.summary: In a recent press release on February 13, 2025, PhaseV, a leading company specializing in software and machine learning for enhanced clinical development optimization, revealed the introduction of a fresh webinar series. This series aims to delve into the newest advancements in the design and implementation of clinical trials. Stay updated for further developments from this groundbreaking initiative.

news.headline: TOYO Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: TOYO) will join renewable energy and investment conferences in Feb & Mar 2025.
news.summary: A company specializing in solar solutions, TOYO Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: TOYO), based in Tokyo, shared on February 13, 2025, its plans to take part in various industry and investment conferences scheduled for February and March of the same year. This includes the CG Sustainability Virtual Summit Fireside Chat featuring Simon.

news.headline: Bloomberg launches Bitcoin & Gold Blend Indices, diversifying portfolios with volatile and stable assets.
news.summary: New York - The release of the Bloomberg Bitcoin & Gold Blend Indices marks a significant development for traditional multi-asset portfolios. These indices combine volatile Bitcoin with stable Gold, providing a new diversification option. Launched on Feb. 13, 2025, by Bloomberg, these indices are among the pioneering multi-asset indices in the market. Investors now have access to a unique blend of assets, with the potential to enhance portfolio diversification and risk management amid market fluctuations.

news.headline: Carrier Global Corporation's Chairman & CEO to present at Barclays Industrial Select Conference on Feb 20, 2025, at 9:15 am ET, webcast available.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, David Gitlin, the Chairman & CEO of Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), is scheduled to address the Barclays Industrial Select Conference on February 20, 2025, at 9:15 a.m. ET. Live coverage of the event can be accessed at ir.carrier.com. Additionally, a webcast featuring this speech will be...

news.headline: Global equity issuance value hit highest level since 2021 in Q4 2024, with IPO transactions rising over 3.0%.
news.summary: In the final quarter of 2024, there was a noticeable recovery in global equity issuance activity as per the recent Q4 2024 Global M&A and Equity Offerings Report by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Specifically, global IPO transactions saw a quarterly increase of over 3.0%.

news.headline: HiBob acquires Mosaic to expand FP&A capabilities, bridging HR and finance for workforce productivity. Announcement made on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: In New York on February 13, 2025, HiBob, the company renowned for Bob, the top global Human Capital Management (HCM) platform, revealed its acquisition of Mosaic, a cloud-based Financial platform. This strategic move aims to merge HR and Finance to boost workforce productivity and ensure business success. The industry-leading platform, Bob, coupled with Mosaic's innovative financial technologies, promises to revolutionize the business landscape. This acquisition underscores HiBob's commitment to integration and efficiency in the modern corporate environment.

news.headline: Ritchie Bros.' Premier Global Auction in Orlando will showcase 16,000+ heavy equipment assets and vehicles.
news.summary: RB Global, Inc. revealed that Ritchie Bros. Auctioneers will hold a premier global auction event in Orlando from Feb. 17-21. The event will showcase over 16,000 items available online, with new inventory being added regularly. Interested bidders have the option to view listings online, complete with high-quality photos and videos, or attend preview days in person. RB Global, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under RBA and TSX under RBA.

news.headline: Mobile Infrastructure Corp [NYSE: BEEP] to release Q4 & FY 2024 earnings after market close on March 10, 2025, with conference call on March 11, 2025 at 8 AM EST.
news.summary: CINCINNATI--Mobile Infrastructure Corporation, listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol BEEP, will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 after the U.S. market closes on Monday, March 10, 2025. The company invites participation in a conference call with senior management on March 11, 2025, at 8:00 AM Eastern Time to discuss the earnings. The Q4 & FY 2024 Conference Call is scheduled for Tuesday, March 11, 2025.

news.headline: Sara Harris is named National Sales Director at Purchasing Power®, expanding its programs in the West & Midwest regions.
news.summary: Sara Harris has been appointed National Sales Director at Purchasing Power®, a financial wellness voluntary benefit program. Under her leadership, the company aims to expand its core employee purchase program and financial wellness resources in the West and Midwest regions. This move is set to significantly affect employees in these areas by offering them more comprehensive access to these beneficial programs. With this strategic decision, Purchasing Power® aims to bolster its presence and positively impact a larger number of employees in the specified regions.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions reported a 32.6% gross profit increase and 11-point margin increase in fiscal Q2 2025. They secured 19 new accounts, reaching over 400 active accounts across 19 countries. Total revenues for the second quarter were $0.61M with a net loss of $2.26M. They have $2.24M in cash and $4.20M in shareholders equity. The company remains on track for U.S. market expansion in 2025.
news.summary: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. reported a 32.6% increase in gross profit and an 11-point gross profit margin increase due to higher-margin cartridge sales. They submitted an FDA 510(k) for planned expansion into the U.S. market in 2025, securing 19 new accounts in the quarter. The company has over 400 active customer accounts across 19 countries. Total cash on hand was $2.24 million, with a shareholder's equity of $4.20 million. Total revenue for the second quarter was $0.61 million and $1.48 million for the six months ended December 31, 2024. The gross profit margin increased to 38.5%. Net loss for the second quarter was $2.26 million. The company's focus on higher-margin sales led to improved financial performance and operational efficiencies.

news.headline: SurgePays appoints Allison Seyler as VP of Sales to drive growth in various channels; NASDAQ: SURG.
news.summary: BARTLETT, Tennessee - In a recent announcement today, SurgePays, Inc. (Nasdaq: SURG) appointed Allison Seyler as the new Vice President of Sales. Seyler, a highly experienced technology executive, brings a wealth of knowledge to the role. This move underscores SurgePays' commitment to strengthening its sales division and enhancing their market position. The company's decision to promote Seyler reflects its strategic vision for growth and excellence in the industry.
